title: Tag transaction with project and filter timeline
objective: Verify that a project tag is saved and the timeline can be filtered by project

steps.step: Create a Project named 'Lulea Trip' in Settings → Projects
Record two expenses: one tagged to 'Lulea Trip', one with no project
Open Timeline and filter by Project = 'Lulea Trip'
steps.expected_result: Only the tagged expense is shown; the untagged expense is hidden
